Logger
======

.. automodule:: margrethe.margrethe
    :show-inheritance:

.. automethod:: margrethe.margrethe.Logger.__init__
    :noindex:

.. automethod:: margrethe.margrethe.Logger.__call__
    :noindex:

.. automethod:: margrethe.margrethe.Logger.str
    :noindex:

.. automethod:: margrethe.margrethe.Logger.pbar
    :noindex:

Usage Examples
--------------

Basic Logging
~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Log messages using an instance of `Logger`:

.. code-block:: python

    from logger import Logger

    logger = Logger(log_dir='logs', width=80)
    logger("This is a log message.")

Progress Bar
~~~~~~~~~~~~

The `Logger` class can also display a progress bar for iterative tasks:

.. code-block:: python

    from logger import Logger
    import time

    logger = Logger(log_dir='logs', width=80)
    total = 100
    for i in range(total + 1):
        logger.pbar(i, total)
        time.sleep(0.1)
